---
params:
  county: "Salt Lake"
  data_dir: "data/remotes"
format:
  typst:
    margin:
      x: 0.4in
      y: 0.35in
    fontsize: 8pt
---

```{=typst}
#set page(flipped: true)
#set text(size: 7pt)
```

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(yaml)
library(tinytable)

settings    <- yaml::read_yaml("config/settings.yml")
report_data <- readRDS(file.path(params$data_dir, "report_data.rds"))
tract_maps  <- readRDS(file.path(params$data_dir, "tract_maps.rds"))

county_data <- dplyr::filter(report_data, county == params$county) |>
  dplyr::arrange(GEOID)

county_maps <- tract_maps[county_data$GEOID]
```

```{r}
#| label: save-maps
#| include: false

# Save each tract map to PNG so tinytable can embed them as inline images.
# PNGs are cached in data_dir/map_cache/ — safe to delete and regenerate.
map_dir <- file.path(params$data_dir, "map_cache")
dir.create(map_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)

map_paths <- purrr::imap_chr(county_maps, function(map, geoid) {
  path <- file.path(map_dir, paste0(geoid, ".png"))
  ggplot2::ggsave(
    filename = path,
    plot     = map,
    width    = settings$map_width_in,
    height   = settings$map_height_in,
    dpi      = 200,
    bg       = "white"
  )
  path
})
```

```{r}
#| label: table

tbl_data <- county_data |>
  dplyr::mutate(map = "") |>    # placeholder; filled by plot_tt() below
  dplyr::select(
    # Map (col 1 — filled by plot_tt)
    map,

    # Tract Info
    GEOID, pop, hh,
    total_acres, oz1_acres, oz1_pct, dev_acres,

    # Urban Institute
    oztoolclassification, pvrty_r, unmpl_r, mfi,

    # Housing
    units_total, res_acres_total, res_acres_sfd, res_acres_mf_sfa,

    # Transit
    transit_stop_count, sap_acres, sap_pct,
    ato_jobtransit, ato_hhtransit,

    # Auto
    freeway_exit_count, ato_jobauto, ato_hhauto,

    # Growth 2027-2037
    hh_added, pop_added, jobs_added
  )

col_labels <- c(
  "Map",
  "Tract ID", "Population", "Households",
  "Total Acres", "OZ 1.0 Acres", "OZ 1.0 %", "Dev. Acres",
  "OZ Investment Likelihood", "Poverty Rate", "Unemp. Rate", "Median Family Income",
  "Total Units", "Res. Acres", "SFD Acres", "MF/SFA Acres",
  "Rail/BRT Stops", "SAP Acres", "SAP %",
  "ATO Jobs (Transit)", "ATO HHs (Transit)",
  "Freeway Exits", "ATO Jobs (Auto)", "ATO HHs (Auto)",
  "HHs Added", "Pop. Added", "Jobs Added"
)

tinytable::tt(
  tbl_data,
  notes   = "Sources: Federal OZ 2.0 eligibility, Urban Institute, WFRC/MAG regional data. Growth projections 2027-2037.",
  width   = 1
) |>
  tinytable::plot_tt(
    j      = 1,
    images = unname(map_paths),
    height = settings$map_height_in / 10,  # tinytable height is in inches / 10
    width  = settings$map_width_in  / 10
  ) |>
  tinytable::setNames(col_labels) |>
  tinytable::style_tt(
    fontsize = 6,
    align    = "l"
  )
```
